products.name: Para-Cushion 303 Back
products.descriptor: Back-style personnel parachute system with harness/container and canopy options

evidence.snippet:
303 Back is recommended for use in airplanes where head room is at a minimum and moving forward in the cockpit is not restricted. 303 Back comes with:
*   Harness/Container
*   Mid-Lite Parachute or 30 FT Lo-Po
*   Ripcord

303 Back measures 24″ (60 cm) tall by 16″ (40 cm) wide by 3″ (7 cm) thick\* and weighs approximately 15 lbs (6.5 kg)\*\*. In many cases, by removing the back cushion of the seat pan, the pilot may place 303 Back in its place.

products.name: MSC-11 (G-16) Modular Semispherical Cruciform Parachute
products.descriptor: US Army-certified 101 ft modular semispherical cruciform cargo parachute, replaces G-11

evidence.snippet: US Army has certified the MSC-11 (G-16) Parachute System as a direct replacement for the aging G-11 parachute system throughout the US DOD. A single version of the G-16 is used to replace all versions of the G-11.
Modular Semispherical Cruciform Parachute and Parachute Inlet Control System are covered by U.S. Patents & manufactured by Paradigm Parachute and Defense Inc.

AIRDROP PLATFORMS “TYPE V”

*   1 set Extraction Bracket Assembly
*   1 ea. Inside EFTA Bracket
*   1 ea. Outside EFTA Bracket
*   2 ea. Tandem Link Assembly

products.name: Next-Gen SET-10 / SET-10R Personnel Parachute System
products.descriptor: Steerable round main canopy personnel parachute system for airborne operations at lower exit altitudes

evidence.snippet:
### Next-Gen SET-10 and Next-Gen SET-10R
For Airborne Operations, SET-10 and SET-10XL steerable round main canopies are engineered to put Paratroopers safely on the ground from lower exit altitudes. The Next-Gen SET-10R system can be configured with 26 FT Military Lo-Po or 30 FT Lo-Po canopies to accommodate a wide range of exit weights and deployment speeds.

evidence.snippet: Paradigm Parachute and Defense is proud to announce the launch of the most advanced altimeter to date, a rugged, wrist-mounted smart display built specifically for the needs of today’s tactical parachutist.
